name: Dumbbell Chest Fly
setup: Lie on flat bench, dumbbells pressed above chest
Palms facing each other, arms slightly bent (~15 degrees)
execution: With elbows fixed in slight bend, lower dumbbells out to sides
Lower until chest stretch or shoulders say stop (not past parallel)
Reverse motion, squeeze dumbbells together at top
common_mistakes: Range of motion too deep (shoulder injury risk)
cues: Hug a tree on the concentric
Feel the stretch in chest, not shoulders
